theme: AI agents, MCP, skills, browser QA, and tasteful workflow products

opportunities.name: Browser QA Receipt for vibe-coded apps
opportunities.audience: indie builders shipping AI-generated web apps
opportunities.wedge: Open a real page, capture screenshots, console errors, broken links, mobile checks, and output a Markdown launch receipt.

opportunities.name: Side-Alley Radar for weekly idea selection
opportunities.audience: builders who want small GitHub projects from current trends
opportunities.wedge: Translate crowded hot repo categories into small, defensible weekly builds.
opportunities.first_artifact: Skill + score script + weekly report template

opportunities.name: MCP Fit Check for small teams
opportunities.audience: developers tempted to build an MCP server
opportunities.wedge: A decision workflow that says whether an idea should be MCP, CLI, API, or just docs.

opportunities.name: Design Taste Patch for GitHub READMEs
opportunities.audience: open-source builders with useful but bland repos
opportunities.wedge: Rewrite the first screen of a README into a tasteful product door without adding AI changelog clutter.

opportunities.name: Vertical Skill Forge for boring industries
opportunities.wedge: Create installable skills for narrow workflows like admissions review, local ads audit, dental intake, or course operations.
